lifeTime.title: How long the particles take to fade out

emissionRateOverDistance.title: How many particles are emitted per world unit
emissionRateOverDistance.description: Often used for things like dust tails behind vehicles

emisionRateOverTime.title: How many particles are emitted per second

emissionShape.title: The shape the particles are emitted from

emissionShapeSize.title: The size of the shape particles are emitted from

sortingOrder.title: The sorting order. Higher gets rendered above lower.
